title: STORi 3-Pack Premium Quality Qtip and Cotton Ball Holders | 15-oz, 30-oz, and 60-oz Clear Plastic Apothecary Jars with Lids | Perfect Containers for Bathroom and Vanity | Set of 3
description:
About this item
Premium Quality Qtip and Cotton Ball Holders: This set includes three premium-quality acrylic plastic jars designed specifically to hold cotton swabs and cotton balls. With capacities of 15 ounces, 30 ounces, and 60 ounces, these jars offer ample storage space for your bathroom essentials.
Original Design with Classic Yet Stylish Look: The design of these jars strikes a perfect balance between functionality and aesthetics. Their classic yet stylish appearance adds a decorative touch to any bathroom or vanity while serving a practical purpose.
Glass-like Feel Without the Risk of Shattering: Crafted from high-quality acrylic plastic, these jars mimic the look and feel of glass but eliminate the risk of shattering. You can enjoy the elegance of glassware without worrying about accidents, making them safe for use in bathrooms, kitchens, and around the house.
Safe and Versatile Usage: These jars are safe to use in various settings, including bathrooms, kitchens, and other areas of the house. Whether you need storage solutions for cosmetics, kitchen ingredients, or decorative items, these jars offer versatility and convenience.
Perfect Sizes for Vanity and Bath: With sizes ranging from 15 ounces to 60 ounces, these jars are perfectly sized for use in vanities and bathrooms. Their crystal-clear design enhances visibility and makes it easy to locate items while adding a touch of elegance to your space. Whether you need to store cotton swabs, cotton balls, cosmetics, or kitchen essentials, these jars provide the ideal storage solution.
reviews_5s:
I read a lot of reviews of apothecary jars before buying this set, plus the additional separate large one (three in the set and then an additional large one, which is the same size as the large one in the set). In the separate large one I have epsom salt; in the three set I have qtips, cotton rounds and cotton balls.)
These are just wonderful. They have a very thick bottom which looks just like glass and weights the container nicely. There was one set of apothecary jars I read reviews on that had very tightly fitted lids. These do not seal like that. I didn't want a set that did that. I wanted a lid to lift easily with one hand in case the other was occupied by hand cream or something, I wanted an easy off lid. These fit the bill. One handed you can remove and re-set these lids. They have a nice lip that fits into the top but it is more like a cookie jar fit, sets nicely on top, not a tupperware seal type fit that would require two hands to open. They look great, are perfect size and provide an appealing look and finish to the bathroom. I would give them six stars if I could.I have 2 young boys, so I use these in our bathroom, because our old ones were glass. We have had them about 4 years and like them a lot! We have had no issues with them (despite being pretty hard on them) and they’re very good sizes.

The do collect dust a little easier than some things, but they’re easy to clean.

I think the design is nice, but they do look like they are plastic (I mean, they are plastic, sooooo…), so not really high end looking, but nice still. And the price reflects that, and these are definitely worth the price!These look greatI like the price, the varying sizes - perfect for the bathroom, the clear containers and the lids. Really cute!They sell these exact containers at the container store for more money. I like that it comes in an array of sizes. It’s a thick plastic too, so I imagine they can withstand a fall. The labels are easy to remove and there isn’t any permanent labeling. We use these for various treats on our Halloween “trolley” HP cart, and it’s been a hit.These are amazing. Very cute for storing items in the laundry room and bathroom. Just be careful, they do scratch easily.We remodeled our laundry room, and I wanted to put our white laundry booster in something aesthetically pleasing because every linen in our home is white--and we live on a lake with hard, Southern clay water, and I do white laundry at least once per day. I knew glass would be heavy and asking for trouble, and I wanted something economical. This one holds 60 oz and has a wide mouth top. I found the scoop on Amazon as well (search for "RSVP International Endurance Kitchen Collection Measuring Tools, Dishwasher Safe, Vintage Mini Scoop, Stainless Steel"), and it's perfect since it scoops 1/3 cup each time. It fits in this jar and allows you to scoop out without contorting yourself. PSA: If you have whites, you need this Arm & Hammer booster--trust me, your laundry will never look more amazing. No more orange streaks! I put that in the photo so you could see an entire box fit in the jar--when you get the package, it looks disappointingly small, but by volume, it does hold what it says it will. Very happy with the quality and the functionality!It's the perfect size to store dishwasher tabs which is what we bought it for. It's a nice bright, clear jar with a quiet close cover. We had been using a glass jar before and it would clink loudly when closing. It's perfect!These are well made containers for my bathrooms. I may buy more for guest bathUsing it for my Tide Pods. Looks cute and simple.
reviews_1s:
Was so looking forward to receiving this set! Quality is very good and size as listed. HOWEVER, received a lid only for the smallest canister. Missing lids for med and large canister.Item fogged up in several areas after I put peppermint life savers in jar. ( tried to photograph and system would not allow )The bottom cracked off as I was holding it, leaving a razor sharp edge along the rim that produce a nice cut. In these times of overly cautious warning labels, this should come with one that says "Warning, not for storing chemicals, including sodium chloride." I'd limit this to storying Qtips and cotton balls. I bought three of these to store bath salts in. All three developed cracks around the base. One base completely separated from the sides. This may have been due to the interaction of the plastic with the salts. I wouldn't recommend these if you're storing loose bath salts in them.Update Dec 2021 - The entire bottom of one of these containers just came off. It held laundry powder. I can't really recommend these now. I'm outside of the "support" window on this product, but I would have expected it to last several years.

Original review -
These look really nice! I bought them to store Tide pods and powder laundry detergent in (haven't figured out what to use the smallest one for yet). They're smaller than I expected, but the large one still held 40 tide pods, so I'm happy with it. It looks much better than the giant Costco tub! Obviously not child proof containers, but I'm not worried about that.Not very durable. I placed Epsom bath salts in the largest container and after 1 day the bottom of the container shattered (on the inside) it still holds the salts, however it is very unsightly. The first time I saw this I thought it was maybe something that I did incorrectly, so I ordered another set and it did the same thing! Product is not very durable, I do not recommend putting bath salt or anything of much weight inside the container.When I was purchasing the product, it wasn’t clearly stated that it came with just 1 jar. If you scroll down, the different option jars shows 3 of them, which for that price, fantastic. But to my surprise, when I opened it, it was just 1 jar. Very disappointing.Was so excited to get these but so beyond disappointed when we took them out of the package and one was oozing clear liquid from the bottom seams of the jar and a day later the other two did the same a ruined my counter and shelf. It was like thick clear sticky glue.I was not happy with this it came as described I bought this used.... though it didn’t come with a earring stating the lid would be missing.... so I expected to open the packaging and take both the lid and the jar out only to find out there was no lid... it is sturdy and easy to clean.I bought this acrylic jar in April 2021 to store Epsom salts in my bathroom. Now I’m May 2021 and the jar is cracking all around the bottom from the inside out. This is very disappointing to have to buy another container after one month...but it won’t be this one again.The reason I bought this was to hold my Q-Tips in the smaller container. The lid has the ridge on the inside instead of the outside so the lid won't fit if you have Q-Tips inside - except if you only have a dozen or so so they all lay down - otherwise the lid just sits on and smashes your Q-Tips. I wish I could return this because I definitely won't be using it. If I would have kept the packaging it would be on its way back.
